Guidelines

Do's & Don'ts

Do

  • Use the black-and-white colour system consistently
  • Keep Bebas Neue for all large headline text
  • Give the logo generous clear space on all sides
  • Use high-contrast, sharp photography — grayscale preferred
  • Keep layouts clean with strong negative space
  • Use Cormorant italic sparingly for premium moments
  • Maintain consistent tracking on all display type

Don't

  • Introduce colours outside the approved palette
  • Stretch, rotate, or add effects to the logo
  • Use the logo on busy or clashing backgrounds
  • Use warm filters or over-saturated photography
  • Mix more than two typefaces in a single layout
  • Use default system fonts (Arial, Helvetica, etc.)
  • Crowd elements — whitespace is part of the brand
